'''Hin''' was a [[Yuzzem]] and the companion of [[Kee (Yuzzem)|Kee]].

==Biography==
Like many other Yuzzem, Hin and Kee were enslaved as part of the [[Humanocentrism|Humanocentric]] policies of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and were put to work on the jungle [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Mimban/Legends|Mimban]], where the Imperials had mining operations, due to their incredible strength. When they protested, the mining official waved documents at them and mocked them. In response, the two disgruntled Yuzzem took their equipment and started to fill in the [[Mine/Legends|mine]] instead of emptying it.

However, [[Captain-Supervisor]] [[Grammel]] did not have them shot, as an average Yuzzem did thrice the work of the average [[Human/Legends|Human]] miner, and that both Yuzzem had been intoxicated out of their minds. Interestingly, the species had long [[Hangover/Legends|hangovers]] due to their massive size. So both Yuzzem were incarcerated at a maximum secure holding cell due to their strength.

By coincidence, [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] were put in the same cell as them since there was no more space in the prison. During this time, the Rebels made friends with Hin and Kee. When Grammel arrived at the cell to interrogate Luke and Leia, whom had claimed to be escaped criminals from nearby [[Circarpous IV]], Kee grabbed Grammel's neck and was shot by a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]. However, Kee recovered quickly due to his unique anatomy.

[[File:HinDeath.jpg|thumb|left|Hin sacrificed his life to save Luke.]]

Later, [[Halla]] (whom had befriended Luke and Leia earlier) freed the captives from their cell by using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to throw a food tray at the [[photoplate]] in the corridor which opened the cell's doors. Due to the incredible strength of the two Yuzzem, the inmates and Halla managed to escape from the base. They were then joined by the famous droids [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and then escaped into the surrounding jungle on a stolen military [[Swamp crawler]].

Together with their newly-found friends, Hin and Kee would survive encounters with a massive [[Wandrella]], a tribe of territorial [[Coway]] and Imperial stormtroopers sent after them. However, they were slain while guarding the swamp speeder by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] at the [[Temple of Pomojema]]. When Luke's leg got stuck under a massive rock, Hin gathered all his strength to free him. He died only moments later from his severe wounds.
